title: LIFE XP RELOAD
description: Especially for creators: Life XP offers the perfect platform for your next minecraft series or stream marathon. Expanded world, optimization and endless possibilities for content!
body:
# LIFE XP: Full Edition - Especially for Youtubers and Streamers! 🎮✨

Welcome to **LIFE XP** – a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack created exclusively for the private servers of the youtuber and streamer community! 🤝 This pack is the perfect platform to create compelling content, amazing collaborations, and unforgettable adventures with your audience. We've focused on **stability** ⚙️, **performance** 🚀, and maximum **gameplay diversity** 🌍 to make each of your streams or videos truly unique.


![lxp banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a07fbed227ae9a6c41adb8df4480d622091389_0.webp)

---

## Features for Content Creators: 🌟

* **Stability and performance for broadcasts:** We've paid special attention to optimization to make your gameplay as smooth and lag-free as possible. The pack provides **stable FPS** 📈 even when actively interacting with new mechanics and in large multiplayer sessions.
* **A rich arsenal of items and mechanics:** Explore vast branches of magic ✨, master advanced technology 🔬, create complex automated systems 🏭, or simply build your dream home 🏠 using thousands of new decorative blocks. All of this offers huge scope for creativity and unique storylines!
* **Visual appeal for viewers:** Immerse yourself in a stunning visual world with lighting enhancements 💡, realistic effects 🌿, and atmospheric sounds 🎶. Your game will look great, attracting and holding your audience's attention!
* **Tools for moderation and cooperative play:** This pack includes a number of mods that make server administration easier and improve interaction between players, making joint streams and recordings even more comfortable. ✅

---

## System Requirements: 💻

* **Minecraft Version:** `1.21.1 + 1.21.4 (Future support for 1.21 and higher)` ⬆️
* **Mod Loader:** `Fabric` 🧵 + `NeoForge` 🦊
* **Recommended RAM:** `4-8 GB`  🐏
* **Recommended Processor:** `Intel Core i3 11 GEN / AMD Ryzen 5 7000 or higher` 🧠
* **Recommended Graphics Card:** `NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 Super / AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT or higher` 🖼️

---

## How to Install (for players): 🚀

1.  Make sure you have a modern Minecraft Launcher installed (e.g., **ModrinthApp**, **Prism Launcher**, **MultiMC**). 📥
2.  Open the Launcher and create a new instance by selecting "Import from Modrinth" and specifying **LIFE XP RELOADED**. 📦
3.  Assign the required amount of RAM (`4GB` is recommended). 💾
4.  Connect to your private server and start creating! 🎉

---

## Support and Feedback: 💬

* Have questions, found a bug, or have suggestions for improvements for content creators? Join our **[Discord server](https://www.life-xp.ru)** ➡️
* You can also report bugs on the Modrinth project page. 🐛

---

## Acknowledgements: 🙏

A huge thanks to all the wonderful mod developers whose hard work makes this pack possible, and to all the creators who will choose LIFE XP for their next big projects! 💖

---

We hope you enjoy creating incredible content in the world of LIFE XP! Good luck! 🌟
